text.title: EU Sovereign LLM Deployment Bundle Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply eu-sovereign-llm-deployment-bundle. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Classify risk
step.description: Input: Use-case spec. Action: Apply EU AI Act risk class (minimal/limited/high/prohibited).. Output: Risk class..

step.name: Pick EU providers
step.description: Input: Risk class + region map. Action: Select inference + storage + observability providers with EEA-only commitment.. Output: Vendor list..
step.note: Step 2. Required input: Risk class + region map.

step.name: Sub-processor audit
step.description: Input: Vendor list. Action: Enumerate full sub-processor chain; verify EEA / adequacy.. Output: Cleared vendor list..

step.name: Wire deny-by-default egress
step.description: Input: Cleared vendor list. Action: Network policy + monitoring; allowlist reviewed quarterly.. Output: Egress envelope..
step.note: Step 4. Required input: Cleared vendor list.

step.name: Audit event pipeline
step.description: Input: Inference gateway. Action: Emit AI Act audit event per call; retain per regulatory SLA.. Output: Audit pipeline..

step.name: Annual review
step.description: Input: All artefacts. Action: Re-validate against current EU AI Act guidance + classification.. Output: Refreshed bundle..
